title: Minecraft Celestial
description: The official Minecraft Celestial Modpack. Enjoy space, vehicles and more!
body:
![Celestial Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8390e4f241bcd0e04a9a8930eca64177ea8ecca.png)

The **Minecraft Celestial** Modpack

Visit space, get around the world with cars, trains, ships, planes and rocket ships and have fun with the create mod! Also included are shops, elytra improvements, streamer utils, maps and performance/quality of life mods

The pack was designed for [Vision Projects](https://www.visionprojects.net/)' "Minecraft Celestial" community project.
